_doc: Budgets for `npm run perf` (the frame-cost gate). The gate is DATA: relative.* caps judge each zone against the SAME run's town control (machine-independent — a slow laptop slows both sides); absolute.* are generous backstops for outright hitching. gapP50Mul/gapP99Mul multiply the town control's percentile, slackMs adds flat headroom so a tiny control (fast machine, vsync floor) never divides into an impossible cap. Hitch rates are per minute of steady-state walking; entryWorstGapMs caps the zone-load burst.

forest._todo: The sealed deep-forest canopy is the known heaviest steady-state scene (veil fades + understory density). Budgeted here explicitly pending its own optimization pass — do NOT widen the shared caps to hide it.
